title: The Indian Museum Act, 1910
full_text: The Indian Museum Act, 1910 भारतीय संग्रहालय अधिनियम,1910 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 191010 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 1910-03-18 Act Year: 1910 Short Title: The Indian Museum Act, 1910 Hindi Title: भारतीय संग्रहालय अधिनियम,1910 Long Title: An Act to consolidate and amend the law relating to the Indian Museum. Ministry: Ministry of Culture Enforcement Date: 01-06-1910 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Articles received in exchange or purchased and moneys realised from sale to be held on trust. Show Related Subordinates Section 12A. Show Related Subordinates Section 15A. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Property in collections on determination of trust. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. [Repealed.].
